subcodes.first_line: O thou who yearneth for the lane of the Friend, a hundred glad tidings that thou art granted leave to visit the Court of Divine Unity, and a thousand joyous tidings that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق کوی دوست صد بشارت که ماذون زیارت درگاه احدیت هستی و هزار مژده که
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
